summary: Iteration 69: Verified Design Quality Prompt Enhancements. All 18 unit tests passed. The code changes correctly implement: (1) buildDesignExcellenceBlock() exported from prompt-builder.js with Unsplash URLs, glass-morphism, and glow effects, (2) plan-executor.js imports and uses buildDesignExcellenceBlock in EXECUTE PLAN section, (3) message-stream.js includes DESIGN QUALITY FOR NEW PROJECTS section conditional on isNewProjectBuild, (4) CanvasPanel.jsx brief text includes 'Build this project now with COMPLETE' marker without old verbose 150-line minimum, (5) isSimpleFrontendEdit returns false for Creative Brief prompts.

issues: Supabase auth lock warning in console - non-blocking, related to React Strict Mode (same as iteration_68)

critical_code_review_comments: prompt-builder.js line 64: buildDesignExcellenceBlock() is properly exported with comprehensive design instructions
prompt-builder.js lines 77-86: Contains Unsplash URLs for various categories (kids, people, nature, products, etc.)
prompt-builder.js lines 88-94: Contains glass-morphism, gradient text, glow effects, and floating decorative elements instructions
plan-executor.js line 16: Correctly imports buildDesignExcellenceBlock from prompt-builder.js
plan-executor.js line 83: Calls ${buildDesignExcellenceBlock()} in the EXECUTE PLAN system message
message-stream.js line 661: DESIGN QUALITY FOR NEW PROJECTS section is conditional on isNewProjectBuild
message-stream.js lines 662-667: Design quality section mentions separate component files, 200+ lines per page, and specific sections
CanvasPanel.jsx line 139: Brief text includes 'Build this project now with COMPLETE' marker for isBriefBuild detection
intents.js line 460: isSimpleFrontendEdit returns false for 'Build this project now with COMPLETE' marker
intents.js line 463: isSimpleFrontendEdit returns false for messages > 600 chars

success_rate.frontend: 100% - App loads correctly, login form functional

context_for_next_testing_agent: Design quality prompt enhancements are verified. The buildDesignExcellenceBlock() function is properly exported, imported, and used in plan-executor.js. The message-stream.js includes design quality instructions for new projects. The CanvasPanel brief format includes the 'Build this project now with COMPLETE' marker which triggers isBriefBuild detection and ensures Creative Briefs go through the multi-file propose_plan flow. The isSimpleFrontendEdit fix from iteration_68 is still working correctly.

frontend_tests.login_form_functional: PASS - Login form accepts input and submits

design_excellence_header.code: ## DESIGN EXCELLENCE — YOU ARE A WORLD-CLASS WEB DESIGNER

import_statement.code: import { buildProjectManagerPrompt, buildRefinementPrompt, buildNewPagePrompt, buildDesignExcellenceBlock } from './prompt-builder.js'

separate_component_files.code: Plan for SEPARATE component files for each page

brief_marker.code: Build this project now with COMPLETE, production-ready pages

brief_marker_check.code: if (/Build this project now with COMPLETE/i.test(text)) return false
